summary: Completed comprehensive testing of resume/CV website with admin panel. Backend APIs working at 93.3% success rate, frontend public resume and admin functionality working well, with minor UI loading issues in some admin sections.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized requests

ui_bugs.issue: Some admin sections (Skills, Contact, View Resume, Logout) not consistently accessible via data-testid selectors during testing
ui_bugs.selector: Navigation elements may have loading delays or different testid patterns

ui_bugs.issue: Projects section in admin dashboard experiences loading timeouts

passed_tests: All public resume endpoints (profile, experience, projects, skills, contact, resume)
Public resume page loading and data display
Profile section updates in admin panel
Frontend-backend integration (admin changes reflected on public page)
Navigation between public resume and admin pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Ensure all admin dashboard navigation sections load consistently with proper data-testid attributes, 2) Optimize Projects section loading performance, 3) Verify all navigation elements have consistent testid patterns for better testability
